About Tresmares
A pan-european alternative
investment firm focused on driving
SME growth

Founded in 2014, it currently has a team of over 60 professionals across its three offices in Madrid, London, and Frankfurt, from where it can execute transactions across Europe.

Private Equity

Direct Lending

Tailored financing that can combine amortizable tranches (TLA) and non-amortizable tranches to maturity / bullet (TLB) to finance different uses (acquisitions, capex, M&A, dividends, etc.)

Fund of Funds
